name: auth_rls_initplan
title: Auth RLS Initialization Plan
description: Detects if calls to \`current_setting()\` and \`auth.<function>()\` in RLS policies are being unnecessarily re-evaluated for each row
detail: Table \`public.admin_notices\` has a row level security policy \`Master users can manage notices\` that re-evaluates current_setting() or auth.<function>() for each row. This produces suboptimal query performance at scale. Resolve the issue by replacing \`auth.<function>()\` with \`(select auth.<function>())\`. See [docs](https://supabase.com/docs/guides/database/postgres/row-level-security#call-functions-with-select) for more info.

name: multiple_permissive_policies
title: Multiple Permissive Policies
description: Detects if multiple permissive row level security policies are present on a table for the same \`role\` and \`action\` (e.g. insert). Multiple permissive policies are suboptimal for performance as each policy must be executed for every relevant query.
detail: Table \`public.manufacturer_container_options\` has multiple permissive policies for role \`authenticated\` for action \`SELECT\`. Policies include \`{container_options_owner_write,container_options_select_all}\`

name: duplicate_index
title: Duplicate Index
description: Detects cases where two ore more identical indexes exist.
detail: Table \`public.chat_rooms\` has identical indexes {chat_rooms_client_id_manufacturer_id_key,idx_chat_rooms_unique_pair}. Drop all except one of them
